# Requirements Index

- [REQ-FR-260001](requirements/REQ-FR-260001.md): multi-timer countdown behavior.
- [REQ-FR-260002](requirements/REQ-FR-260002.md): multiple named timers.
- [REQ-FR-260003](requirements/REQ-FR-260003.md): active timer switching and control.
- [REQ-FR-260004](requirements/REQ-FR-260004.md): reset and finish behavior.
- [REQ-FR-260005](requirements/REQ-FR-260005.md): countdown visual state.
- [REQ-FR-260006](requirements/REQ-FR-260006.md): two-view screen structure.
- [REQ-OR-260001](requirements/REQ-OR-260001.md): static GitHub Pages deployment.
- [REQ-QR-260002](requirements/REQ-QR-260002.md): mobile-friendly web experience.
- [REQ-QR-260003](requirements/REQ-QR-260003.md): browser-local persistence.
- [REQ-CR-260001](requirements/REQ-CR-260001.md): static hosting only.
- [REQ-CR-260002](requirements/REQ-CR-260002.md): timer limits and naming constraints.
